summary: HMRC Starter Checklist conditional logic implementation verified. Backend correctly includes/excludes HMRC form based on P45 presence. Frontend displays HMRC in Admin/Other section with 'Required because no P45 is on file' helper text when no P45 exists.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: HMRC Starter Checklist in requirements with status 'missing' when no P45 exists
✅ Backend: conditional_not_required is empty when no P45 exists (HMRC is required)
✅ Backend: HMRC requirement has correct category '6_Admin'
✅ Backend: HMRC requirement has correct structure (id, name, status, category, has_evidence)
✅ Frontend: HMRC Starter Checklist visible in Admin/Other section
✅ Frontend: Helper text 'Required because no P45 is on file' displayed in purple
✅ Frontend: HMRC shows 'Still Needed' status with Upload Document button
✅ Frontend: Conditional items panel NOT visible (correct - no P45 exists)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend conditional logic at lines 5892-5937 correctly evaluates conditional_on and conditional_inverse flags
HMRC form definition at lines 349-358 properly sets conditional_on='p45' and conditional_inverse=True
Frontend correctly displays HMRC-specific helper text at lines 3101-3106 when req.id === 'hmrc_starter_checklist'
Frontend conditional_not_required panel at lines 2895-2911 correctly shows/hides based on array length
context_for_next_testing_agent: HMRC Starter Checklist conditional logic verified. The implementation uses conditional_on='p45' and conditional_inverse=True to require HMRC form only when no P45 document exists. Backend evaluates this at lines 5892-5937 in server.py. Frontend shows purple helper text 'Required because no P45 is on file' for HMRC items. To test the inverse scenario (P45 exists, HMRC excluded), upload a P45 document for an employee and verify HMRC moves to conditional_not_required array.
